title: Fried Eggs Jelly Sweets │ 500 Gram Bulk Bag │ 500g │ Assorted Sweet Pick and Mix for Parties, Gifts, and Sharing.

description: Product description Fried Eggs Jelly Sweets - 500 Gram Bulk Bag - 500g - Assorted Sweet Pick and Mix for Parties, Gifts, and Sharing. Ingredients Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Dextrose, Gelatine, Acid: Citric Acid, Flavouring, Fruit and Plant Concentrates: Apple, Aronia, Blackcurrant, Carrot, Elderberry, Grape, Hibiscus, Kiwi, Lemon, Mango, Nettle, Orange, Passion Fruit, Spinach, Glazing Agents: Beeswax, Carnauba Wax, Carob Extract Directions Open the bag carefully. Serve in appropriate portions. Be cautious of potential choking hazards due to the shape and size of the candies. See more
